user_message: hi we keep getting terminal error 1 come up on the screen when we try and take a card payment, its been doing it since about lunchtime, we have a line of people waiting can someone call us back
good_answer_must: acknowledge that a vendor-specific terminal error code cannot be interpreted without the vendor documentation
not invent a meaning for the error code or a fix based on it
gather useful detail before handing off: which terminal, whether all terminals are affected, whether cash sales still work
escalate to the payments or terminal vendor support path
offer the immediate workaround of taking payment on another terminal if one is available

user_message: register 2 has come up with no printer call helpdesk on it. it printed fine yesterday. nothing has changed that i know of. we cant give anyone a receipt now
good_answer_must: establish scope first: whether it is one register or all of them
cover the physical checks (power, cable seating at both ends, any error lights on the printer)
check the print queue for stuck or held jobs and clear it
suggest a printer power cycle and a POS restart in that order, least disruptive first
not ask the user to reinstall drivers or edit printer configuration as an early step

user_message: register 4 is frozen, i cant type anything at all, the keyboard has stopped working. i already tried unplugging it and plugging it back in. we had a bit of a power flicker this morning but everything else seems ok
good_answer_must: separate the two possibilities: a dead keyboard versus a frozen terminal that cannot accept any input
ask a question that distinguishes them, for example whether the mouse or touchscreen still responds or whether the clock on screen is still updating
acknowledge the reseat already attempted rather than asking the user to repeat it
try the keyboard in a different USB port or a known-good keyboard before concluding the peripheral is faulty
treat the power flicker as relevant context worth noting rather than as a confirmed cause

user_message: im a new starter, started monday. i can get into citrix fine and all the other apps open ok but when i click outlook i get an error and it closes straight away. the girl next to me can open hers no worries. can you fix it
good_answer_must: recognise that one app failing inside a working session points away from Citrix itself
connect the new starter detail to likely incomplete mailbox or licence provisioning
not walk the user through profile repair, safe mode, or reinstall steps for an account that may not exist yet
escalate to the team that handles account and mailbox provisioning
confirm the exact error text and the start date before handing off

user_message: scanner isnt scanning. nothing happens when we scan. can you have a look
good_answer_must: ask a clarifying question before suggesting any fix
identify that the symptom fits several distinct causes: a dead scanner, a POS not in a state that accepts scans, items missing from the product file, or damaged barcodes
ask something that discriminates, for example whether the scanner beeps or lights up, whether it fails on every item or only some, and whether other registers are affected
not launch into scanner hardware troubleshooting on the assumption the device is faulty
